name: ai-quality-gate
description: Audits AI-generated code diffs to prevent vibe coding leakage.
author: ithadu

enumDescriptions: Disable the LLM semantic layer — local checks only.
aiQualityGate.llmProvider.description: Which LLM provider to use for deep semantic code auditing. Set to 'none' to run local checks only.

aiQualityGate.apiKey.description: API key for the selected LLM provider (Claude, OpenAI, or Gemini).

aiQualityGate.llmModel.description: Override the default model for the selected provider. Leave empty to use the recommended default (Claude: claude-sonnet-4-6, OpenAI: gpt-4o-mini, Gemini: gemini-2.0-flash).

aiQualityGate.cloudEndpoint.description: Override the default API endpoint URL for the selected provider. Useful for proxies or self-hosted compatible endpoints. Leave empty to use the official API.

enumDescriptions: Only surface local findings on lines that changed since the file was opened or last saved (diff-focused).
Only surface local findings on lines that differ from the file's committed git HEAD version. New/untracked files are audited in full.
aiQualityGate.auditMode.description: Scope of local auditing. 'changedLines' diffs against the in-session baseline; 'gitDiff' diffs against git HEAD. Both focus the gate on newly introduced (e.g. AI-pasted) code.

aiQualityGate.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds to wait after the last edit before auditing. Prevents auditing (and cloud calls) on every keystroke.
